examples: Involved in isostatic correction sometimes taken as the top of the asthenosphere.
Other processes such as lost foam, squeeze casting, and hot isostatic pressing are also mentioned.
Hot Isostatic Pressing Powders are usually encapsulated in a metallic container but sometimes in glass.
Earlier projections apparently failed to account for rebounding changes in the Earth's crust following the last Ice Age (referred to as "glacial isostatic adjustment").
